    "text": "func devUiPassthroughHandler(passthroughDir string) http.Handler {\nn1: \tconst op = \"controller.devPassthroughHandler\"\nn2: \tctx := context.TODO()\n\t// Panic may not be ideal but this is never a production call and it'll\n\t// panic on startup. We could also just change the function to return\n\t// an error.\nn3: \tabs, err := filepath.Abs(passthroughDir)\nn4: \tif err != nil {\nn5: \t\tpanic(err)\n\t}\nn6: \tevent.WriteSysEvent(ctx, op, \"serving passthrough files at /\", \"path\", abs)\nn7: \tfs := http.FileServer(http.Dir(abs))\nn8: \tprefixHandler := http.StripPrefix(\"/\", fs)\n\nn9: \treturn prefixHandler\n}\n"
  }
}

Implemented rename across the codebase:
- Renamed `flagPassthroughDirectory` to `flagUiPassthroughDir` in the dev command.
